spec:
# Component Specification: Bookmark List (Home Screen)

**Screen:** `/` ‚Äî QuickMarks Bookmark List
**Spec Version:** 1.0
**Token Source:** QuickMarks Design Token System v1.0

---

## 1. Component Tree

```
BookmarkListScreen                          [page root]
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ FilterZone                              [sticky section, z-index: 1100]
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ SearchBar                           [compound input component]
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ SearchIcon                      [decorative, leading adornment]
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ SearchInput                     [<input type="search">]
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ ClearButton                     [√ó, conditional render]
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ TagFilterChipRow                    [horizontally scrollable container]
‚îÇ       ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ ScrollFadeOverlay               [right-edge gradient affordance]
‚îÇ       ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ AllChip                         [always first, reset affordance]
‚îÇ       ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ TagChip[]                       [dynamic, from BookmarkStore.getAllTags()]
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ ContentZone                             [main scrollable region, aria-live="polite"]
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ BookmarkGrid                        [responsive CSS grid]
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ BookmarkCard[]                  [repeated card unit]
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ       ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ CardFront                   [default face]
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ       ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ CardTitle              [<h2> truncated]
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ       ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ CardUrl                [muted, truncated]
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ       ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ CardTagList            [inline chips]
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ       ‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ CardTagChip[]      [max 3 visible]
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ       ‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ TagOverflowPill    ["+N", conditional]
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ       ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ CardTimestamp          [relative time string]
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ       ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ CardActions            [edit + delete icons]
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ       ‚îÇ       ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ EditButton         [pencil icon]
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ       ‚îÇ       ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ DeleteButton       [trash icon]
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ       ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ CardBack                   [delete confirmation face]
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ           ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ ConfirmationText       ["Delete this bookmark?"]
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ           ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ CountdownIndicator     [5s visual timer bar]
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ           ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ ConfirmDeleteButton    ["Yes, delete it"]
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ           ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ CancelDeleteButton     ["Keep it"]
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ EmptyState                          [conditional: store is empty]
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ IllustrationContainer          [pulsing opacity]
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ EmptyHeading                   ["No bookmarks yet"]
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ EmptySubtext
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ EmptyStateCTA                  ["Save your first link" ‚Üí /add]
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ NoResultsState                     [conditional: filters yield 0]
‚îÇ       ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ NoResultsHeading
‚îÇ       ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ NoResultsSubtext
‚îÇ       ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ ClearFiltersButton
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ FAB                                    [fixed, bottom-right]
    ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ PlusIcon
```

---

## 2. Layout Rules

### 2.1 Page-Level Layout

```
‚îå‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îê
‚îÇ  FilterZone (sticky, top: 0)            ‚îÇ
‚îÇ  ‚îå‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îê    ‚îÇ
‚îÇ  ‚îÇ  SearchBar                      ‚îÇ    ‚îÇ
‚îÇ  ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îò    ‚îÇ
‚îÇ  ‚îå‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îê    ‚îÇ
‚îÇ  ‚îÇ  [All] [tag-1] [tag-2] [tag-N‚Üí] ‚îÇ    ‚îÇ
‚îÇ  ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îò    ‚îÇ
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚î§
‚îÇ  ContentZone (scrollable)               ‚îÇ
‚îÇ  ‚îå‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îê  ‚îå‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îê  ‚îå‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îê          ‚îÇ  ‚Üê 3-col desktop
‚îÇ  ‚îÇ Card ‚îÇ  ‚îÇ Card ‚îÇ  ‚îÇ Card ‚îÇ          ‚îÇ
‚îÇ  ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îò  ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îò  ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îò          ‚îÇ
‚îÇ  ‚îå‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îê  ‚îå‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îê  ‚îå‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îê          ‚îÇ
‚îÇ  ‚îÇ Card ‚îÇ  ‚îÇ Card ‚îÇ  ‚îÇ Card ‚îÇ          ‚îÇ
‚îÇ  ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îò  ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îò  ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îò          ‚îÇ
‚îÇ                                    [+]  ‚îÇ  ‚Üê FAB fixed
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îò
```

### 2.2 FilterZone

- **Position:** `position: sticky; top: 0;` ‚Äî remains visible during scroll
- **Z-index:** `z-index: 1100` (token: `z_index.sticky`)
- **Background:** `background: var(--color-bg-primary)` with `backdrop-filter: blur(8px)` for scroll overlap
- **Padding:** `16px 24px` (spacing tokens: `16` horizontal, `24` vertical on desktop); `12px 16px` on mobile
- **Stack direction:** Vertical ‚Äî SearchBar above TagFilterChipRow, `gap: 12px`
- **Bottom border:** `1px solid var(--color-border-default)` to separate from content

### 2.3 SearchBar

- **Width:** `100%` of FilterZone inner width
- **Height:** `44px` minimum (touch target compliance)
- **Internal layout:** Flex row; `SearchIcon` left-pinned (16px inset); `SearchInput` fills remaining space; `ClearButton` right-pinned (8px inset), conditionally visible
- **Icon size:** 18√ó18px; colour `var(--color-text-secondary)`

### 2.4 TagFilterChipRow

- **Layout:** Flex row, `flex-wrap: nowrap`, `overflow-x: auto`, `gap: 8px`
- **Scroll behaviour:** `scroll-snap-type: x mandatory` on the row; each chip `scroll-snap-align: start`
- **Hide scrollbar:** `scrollbar-width: none` (Firefox); `::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none }` (Chrome/Safari)
- **ScrollFadeOverlay:** Pseudo-element or sibling `<div>` absolutely positioned at right edge; `width: 48px`; `background: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, var(--color-bg-primary))`; `pointer-events: none`; hidden when row is scrolled to end
- **Minimum height:** `44px` (guarantees row does not collapse when only "All" chip exists)
- **Padding-right:** `48px` to prevent last chip from being obscured by the fade overlay

### 2.5 ContentZone

- **Padding:** `24px` (desktop/tablet); `16px` (mobile)
- **Padding-bottom (mobile):** `FAB height (56px) + safe-area-inset-bottom + 24px` ‚Äî prevents FAB occlusion of last card's actions
- **Max-width:** `1280px` (token: `layout.content_max_width`); `margin: 0 auto`

### 2.6 BookmarkGrid

| Breakpoint | Columns | Gutter | Card Padding |
|------------|---------|--------|--------------|
| ‚â• 1024px (Desktop) | 3 | 24px | 24px |
| 768‚Äì1023px (Tablet) | 2 | 24px | 20px |
| < 768px (Mobile) | 1 | 16px | 16px |

```css
/* Grid implementation */
.bookmark-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(var(--grid-cols), 1fr);
  gap: var(--grid-gutter);
}
```

### 2.7 BookmarkCard Internal Layout

```
‚îå‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îê
‚îÇ  [Title ‚Äî truncated]            ‚îÇ  ‚Üê CardTitle
‚îÇ  [url.example.com/path‚Ä¶]        ‚îÇ  ‚Üê CardUrl (muted)
‚îÇ                                 ‚îÇ
‚îÇ  [tag1] [tag2] [tag3] [+2]     ‚îÇ  ‚Üê CardTagList
‚îÇ                                 ‚îÇ
‚îÇ  2h ago          [‚úèÔ∏è]  [üóëÔ∏è]   ‚îÇ  ‚Üê Timestamp + Actions (flex space-between)
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îò
```

- **Card layout:** Flex column, `justify-content: space-between`
- **CardTitle:** `margin-bottom: 4px`
- **CardUrl:** `margin-bottom: 12px`
- **CardTagList:** Flex row, `flex-wrap: nowrap`, `gap: 4px`, `margin-bottom: 12px`
- **CardFooter (timestamp + actions):** Flex row, `align-items: center`, `justify-content: space-between`
- **CardActions (desktop):** `opacity: 0`, transitions to `opacity: 1` on card hover/focus-within; always `opacity: 1` on mobile
- **CardActions (mobile):** `opacity: 1` always; rendered as persistent bottom strip

### 2.8 CardBack (Delete Confirmation Face)

```
‚îå‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îê
‚îÇ  "Delete this bookmark?"        ‚îÇ  ‚Üê ConfirmationText (centered)
‚îÇ  ‚ñà‚ñà‚ñà‚ñà‚ñà‚ñà‚ñà‚ñà‚ñà‚ñà‚ñà‚ñà‚ñë‚ñë‚ñë‚ñë‚ñë‚ñë‚ñë‚ñë‚ñë‚ñë‚ñë‚ñë‚ñë‚ñë‚ñë‚ñë‚ñë  ‚îÇ  ‚Üê CountdownIndicator (5s drains left‚Üíright)
‚îÇ                                 ‚îÇ
‚îÇ   [Yes, delete it]  [Keep it]   ‚îÇ  ‚Üê Confirm + Cancel (flex row, centered)
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îò
```

- CardFront and CardBack share identical card dimensions; transition via `opacity` crossfade (not physical flip) at `200ms ease`
- Focus trapped inside CardBack while visible; `aria-live="assertive"` on CardBack region
- `CountdownIndicator`: thin `4px` bar, full width, `background: var(--color-warning)`; shrinks via `width` animation `5000ms linear`

### 2.9 EmptyState Layout

- **Container:** Flex column, `align-items: center`, `text-align: center`, `padding: 64px 24px`
- **IllustrationContainer:** `width: min(280px, 80vw)`, `margin-bottom: 32px`
- **EmptyHeading:** `margin-bottom: 8px`
- **EmptySubtext:** `margin-bottom: 24px`

### 2.10 NoResultsState Layout

- **Container:** Flex column, `align-items: center`, `text-align: center`, `padding: 48px 24px`
- No illustration; text-only treatment
- **Heading ‚Üí Subtext ‚Üí CTA:** vertical stack, `gap: 8px` between text nodes, `gap: 16px` before CTA

### 2.11 FAB

- **Position:** `position: fixed; bottom: 24px; right: 24px` (desktop/tablet)
- **Position (mobile):** `bottom: max(16px, env(safe-area-inset-bottom) + 16px); right: 16px`
- **Size:** `56√ó56px` (exceeds 44px minimum; provides comfortable tap target)
- **Z-index:** `z-index: 1200` (token: `z_index.modal` ‚Äî above sticky filter)

---

## 3. Token Bindings

### 3.1 Colour Tokens

| Component / Element | Token Reference | Resolved Value | Notes |
|-----------------------------|------------------------------|----------------------|-------|
| Page background | `semantic.background-primary` ‚Üí `linen-50` | `#FAFAF7` | |
| FilterZone background | `semantic.background-primary` ‚Üí `linen-50` | `#FAFAF7` | + backdrop-filter |
| Card background | `semantic.surface-primary` ‚Üí `linen-100` | `#F4F1EB` | Warm paper feel |
| Card border | `semantic.border-default` ‚Üí `linen-200` | `#E8E2D9` | 1px solid |
| SearchBar background | `semantic.surface-input` ‚Üí `linen-50` | `#FAFAF7` | |
| SearchBar border (rest) | `semantic.border-default` ‚Üí `linen-200` | `#E8E2D9` | |
| SearchBar border (focus) | `semantic.border-focus` ‚Üí `sage-500` | `#5C8A6E` | 2px, focus ring |
| SearchIcon / leading icon | `semantic.text-secondary` ‚Üí `charcoal-500` | `#78716C` | |
| Search input text | `semantic.text-primary` ‚Üí `charcoal-900` | `#1C1917` | |
| Search placeholder text | `semantic.text-disabled` ‚Üí `charcoal-300` | `#C4BAB2` | |
| ClearButton icon | `semantic.text-secondary` ‚Üí `charcoal-500` | `#78716C` | |
| AllChip (active) fill | `semantic.cta-primary` ‚Üí `sage-500` | `#5C8A6E` | |
| AllChip (active) text | `semantic.text-on-cta` ‚Üí `linen-50` | `#FAFAF7` | Ratio: ~8.5:1 ‚úì |
| AllChip (inactive) border | `semantic.cta-primary` ‚Üí `sage-500` | `#5C8A6E` | Outlined |
| AllChip (inactive) text | `semantic.cta-primary` ‚Üí `sage-500` | `#5C8A6E` | |
| TagChip (active) fill | `semantic.cta-primary` ‚Üí `sage-500` | `#5C8A6E` | |
| TagChip (active) text | `semantic.text-on-cta` ‚Üí `linen-50` | `#FAFAF7` | |
| TagChip (inactive) border | `semantic.cta-primary` ‚Üí `sage-500` | `#5C8A6E` | |
| TagChip (inactive) text | `semantic.cta-primary` ‚Üí `sage-500` | `#5C8A6E` | |
| TagChip on Card (badge) | `semantic.surface-secondary` ‚Üí `linen-200` | `#E8E2D9` | Subdued, inside card |
| TagChip on Card text | `semantic.text-secondary` ‚Üí `charcoal-500` | `#78716C` | |
| TagOverflowPill bg | `semantic.surface-secondary` ‚Üí `linen-200` | `#E8E2D9` | |
| TagOverflowPill text | `semantic.text-secondary` ‚Üí `charcoal-500` | `#78716C` | |
| CardTitle text | `semantic.text-primary` ‚Üí `charcoal-900` | `#1C1917` | |
| CardUrl text | `semantic.text-secondary` ‚Üí `charcoal-500` | `#78716C` | ‚öÝÔ∏è Verify contrast below |
| CardTimestamp text | `semantic.text-secondary` ‚Üí `charcoal-500` | `#78716C` | |
| EditButton icon | `semantic.text-secondary` ‚Üí `charcoal-500` | `#78716C` | ‚Üí `cta-hover` on hover |
| DeleteButton icon (rest) | `semantic.text-secondary` ‚Üí `charcoal-500` | `#78716C` | |
| DeleteButton icon (danger) | `semantic.error` ‚Üí `terracotta-400` | `#D4735A` | ‚öÝÔ∏è Pair with icon, see note |
| ConfirmDeleteButton bg | `semantic.error` ‚Üí `terracotta-400` | `#D4735A` | Text: `linen-50` |
| ConfirmDeleteButton text | `semantic.text-on-cta` ‚Üí `linen-50` | `#FAFAF7` | Ratio: ~4.8:1 ‚úì |
| CancelDeleteButton text | `semantic.text-primary` ‚Üí `charcoal-900` | `#1C1917` | Ghost/text style |
| CountdownIndicator bar | `semantic.warning` ‚Üí `marigold-400` | `#E8A838` | |
| EmptyState heading | `semantic.text-primary` ‚Üí `charcoal-900` | `#1C1917` | |
| EmptyState subtext | `semantic.text-secondary` ‚Üí `charcoal-500` | `#78716C` | |
| EmptyStateCTA bg | `semantic.cta-primary` ‚Üí `sage-500` | `#5C8A6E` | |
| EmptyStateCTA text | `semantic.text-on-cta` ‚Üí `linen-50` | `#FAFAF7` | |
| NoResults heading | `semantic.text-primary` ‚Üí `charcoal-900` | `#1C1917` | |
| NoResults subtext | `semantic.text-secondary` ‚Üí `charcoal-500` | `#78716C` | |
| ClearFiltersButton text | `semantic.cta-primary` ‚Üí `sage-500` | `#5C8A6E` | Text-only button |
| FAB background | `semantic.cta-primary` ‚Üí `sage-500` | `#5C8A6E` | |
| FAB background (hover) | `semantic.cta-hover` ‚Üí `sage-600` | `#4A7259` | |
| FAB icon | `semantic.text-on-cta` ‚Üí `linen-50` | `#FAFAF7` | |
| Focus ring | `semantic.border-focus` ‚Üí `sage-500` | `#5C8A6E` | 2px, 2px offset |
| Overlay (CardBack bg tint) | `semantic.overlay` | `rgba(28,25,23,0.40)` | Scrim behind confirm text |

> ‚öÝÔ∏è **Contrast Note ‚Äî CardUrl:** `charcoal-500` (`#78716C`) on `linen-100` (`#F4F1EB`) yields approximately **4.7:1** ‚Äî passes WCAG AA for normal text (‚â•4.5:1). Monitor in production; if measured value falls below, escalate `text-secondary` to `charcoal-900` for URL-only contexts.
>
> ‚öÝÔ∏è **Contrast Note ‚Äî Danger Actions:** `terracotta-400` (`#D4735A`) on `linen-100` (`#F4F1EB`) yields approximately **3.1:1** ‚Äî insufficient for small text alone. Per spec, **always pair danger colour with a trash/warning icon**. Danger text labels (e.g. button labels on confirmation face) use `linen-50` text on `terracotta-400` background (~4.8:1 ‚úì).

### 3.2 Typography Tokens

| Component / Element | Font Family | Size (px) | Weight | Role Token |
|---------------------|-------------|-----------|--------|------------|
| EmptyState heading | `display` (Sora) | 24 | 700 | `heading-2` |
| NoResultsState heading | `display` (Sora) | 18 | 600 | `heading-3` |
| CardTitle | `display` (Sora) | 18 | 600 | `heading-3` |
| Search input text | `body` (Source Sans 3) | 14 | 400 | `body` |
| Search placeholder | `body` (Source Sans 3) | 14 | 400 | `body` |
| CardUrl | `body` (Source Sans 3) | 14 | 400 | `body` |
| CardTimestamp | `body` (Source Sans 3) | 11 | 400 | `small` |
| EmptyState subtext | `body` (Source Sans 3) | 14 | 400 | `body` |
| NoResultsState subtext | `body` (Source Sans 3) | 14 | 400 | `body` |

## 4. Responsive Breakpoints

Token source: `layout.breakpoints { mobile: 640, tablet: 768, desktop: 1024, wide: 1440 }`

### 4.1 Breakpoint Definitions

| Breakpoint Name | Range | Token Value |
|-----------------|----------------------|-------------|
| Mobile | `< 768px` | `< tablet` |
| Tablet | `768px ‚Äì 1023px` | `tablet ‚Üí desktop` |
| Desktop | `1024px ‚Äì 1439px` | `desktop ‚Üí wide` |
| Wide | `‚â• 1440px` | `wide` |

### 4.2 Full Responsive Behaviour Matrix

| Property | Mobile (`<768px`) | Tablet (`768‚Äì1023px`) | Desktop (`‚â•1024px`) | Wide (`‚â•1440px`) |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Grid columns** | 1 | 2 | 3 | 3 (max-width capped at 1280px) |
| **Grid gutter** | 16px | 24px | 24px | 24px |
| **ContentZone padding** | 16px | 24px | 24px | `(100vw - 1280px)/2` min 24px |
| **Card padding** | 16px | 20px | 24px | 24px |
| **Card border-radius** | 12px | 12px | 12px | 12px |
| **CardActions visibility** | Always visible | Hover-revealed | Hover-revealed | Hover-revealed |
| **CardTagChip max visible** | 2 + "+N" | 3 + "+N" | 3 + "+N" | 3 + "+N" |
| **TagChipRow behaviour** | H-scroll, no wrap | H-scroll, no wrap | H-scroll, no wrap | May wrap to 2 rows (open question) |
| **ScrollFadeOverlay** | Visible | Visible | Visible | Conditional on overflow |
| **FilterZone padding** | 12px V / 16px H | 16px V / 24px H | 16px V / 24px H | 16px V / 24px H |
| **FAB margin from edge** | 16px + safe-area | 24px | 24px | 24px |
| **FAB scroll-aware hide** | Yes (scroll down) | No | No | No |
| **ContentZone pb (FAB buffer)** | 56px + 16px + safe-area | 24px | 24px | 24px |
| **EmptyState illustration** | `min(240px, 70vw)` | `260px` | `280px` | `280px` |
| **SearchBar height** | 44px | 44px | 48px | 48px |

### 4.3 CSS Custom Properties by Breakpoint

```css
/* Base (mobile-first) */
:root {
  --grid-cols: 1;
  --grid-gutter: 16px;
  --content-padding: 16px;
  --card-padding: 16px;
  --fab-margin: 16px;
}

/* Tablet */
@media (min-width: 768px) {
  :root {
    --grid-cols: 2;
    --grid-gutter: 24px;
    --content-padding: 24px;
    --card-padding: 20px;
    --fab-margin: 24px;
  }
}

/* Desktop */
@media (min-width: 1024px) {
  :root {
    --grid-cols: 3;
    --card-padding: 24px;
  }
}

/* Wide ‚Äî constrained to content-max-width */
@media (min-width: 1440px) {
  .content-zone {
    max-width: 1280px;
    margin-inline: auto;
  }
}
```

### 4.4 Component-Specific Breakpoint Rules

#### SearchBar
- `< 768px`: Full width; keyboard opens immediately on tap (no delay)
- `‚â• 768px`: Full width of FilterZone inner column; `height: 48px`

#### TagFilterChipRow
- All breakpoints: Horizontally scrollable, no wrap, `ScrollFadeOverlay` present
- `‚â• 1440px` (open question): Evaluate wrapping to second row if tag count < 8; default to scroll for consistency

#### BookmarkCard ‚Äî CardActions
- `< 768px`: `opacity: 1` always; rendered as
